creator: jinmei@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

a candidate fix has been committed to head and 6-stable. 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=114910 

Adding to audit trail from misfiled PR standards/116704:
 
 jinmei      2007-09-28 06:23:03 UTC
 
   FreeBSD src repository
 
   Modified files:        (Branch: RELENG_6)
 lib/libc/net         getaddrinfo.c 
   Log:
   MFC:
   ensure the head entry of addrinfo chain has non-NULL ai_canonname to be
   compliant with RFC3493.
   
   PR: standards/114910
   Approved by:   ume (mentor)
   lib/libc/net/getaddrinfo.c:     1.86
   
   Revision   Changes    Path
   1.69.2.10  +17 -1     src/lib/libc/net/getaddrinfo.c
